summary: A recurring 'Busted & Booted' USCIS segment that is an animated U.S. map motion-graphic: a red, white, and blue title card and a pin that moves city to city (Fort Lauderdale, Santa Ana, Indianapolis, Miami, Atlanta) labeling each captured person. It carries a music bed and branding and contains no footage or characters. On-screen text reads 'BUSTED & BOOTED', 'Fort Lauderdale, FL: Pablo Escobar's Pilot', 'Santa Ana, CA Bank Robber', 'Indianapolis, IN Fugitive Narcotics Trafficker', 'Miami, FL: 14 Criminal Aliens in Accordance with the Laken Riley Act', and 'Atlanta, GA: Manufacturing Owner Under Investigation for Labor Trafficking'.
notable_text: Fort Lauderdale, FL: Pablo Escobar's Pilot
Miami, FL: 14 Criminal Aliens in Accordance with the Laken Riley Act
Atlanta, GA: Manufacturing Owner Under Investigation for Labor Trafficking
